create-pdf-with-filled-arc-graph.title: Create PDF with Filled Arc Graph
create-pdf-with-filled-arc-graph.description: Shows how to generate a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a filled arc with a custom light‑blue color, and save the document.

add-unfilled-arc-with-custom-stroke.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Custom Stroke to PDF
add-unfilled-arc-with-custom-stroke.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a Graph container, drawing an unfilled arc, and configuring its line width and dash pattern.

insert-circle-radial-gradient-into-pdf-g.title: Insert Circle with Radial Gradient Fill into PDF Graph
insert-circle-radial-gradient-into-pdf-g.description: Demonstrates how to add a circle shape to an Aspose.Pdf Graph and fill it with a radial gradient using two colors.

add-filled-circle-to-pdf.title: Add a Filled Circle to a PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-filled-circle-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a Graph container, and draw a filled circle with a given radius and center coordinates.

create-bezier-curve-in-pdf-graph.title: Create a Bezier Curve in a PDF Graph
create-bezier-curve-in-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to add a Bezier curve defined by four control points to a PDF graph and customize its stroke color and line width using Aspose.Pdf.

add-filled-curve-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Filled Curve to PDF Graph
add-filled-curve-to-pdf-graph.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a Graph container, draw a Bezier curve with a fill color and border thickness, and save the file.

draw-line-with-cap-style.title: Draw a Line with Cap Style in PDF
draw-line-with-cap-style.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a straight line, set its color and thickness, and apply a line cap style.

add-multi-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-g.title: Add Multi-Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
add-multi-colored-line-segments-to-pdf-g.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF graph and add multiple line segments, each with its own color, using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-rounded-rectangle-into-pdf-graph.title: Insert Rounded Rectangle into PDF Graph
insert-rounded-rectangle-into-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding a rectangle with rounded corners, applying a solid fill color and border, and saving the PDF.

add-filled-rectangle-with-dashed-border.title: Add Filled Rectangle with Dashed Border to PDF Graph
add-filled-rectangle-with-dashed-border.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a Graph container, drawing a filled rectangle with a custom dash pattern and border width, and saving the document.

create-ellipse-with-custom-radii-and-str.title: Create Ellipse with Custom Radii and Stroke Color in PDF
create-ellipse-with-custom-radii-and-str.description: This example demonstrates how to draw an ellipse inside a Graph container in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, specifying horizontal and vertical radii and setting the stroke color.

add-gradient-filled-ellipse-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Gradient-Filled Ellipse to PDF Graph
add-gradient-filled-ellipse-to-pdf-graph.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a Graph container, draws an ellipse, and fills it with an axial gradient that transitions from red to blue.

add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
add-centered-graph-to-pdf-page.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a Graph object, aligns it to the page center horizontally, adds it to the first page's Paragraphs collection, and saves the modified document.

place-graph-left-margin-offset.title: Place a Graph Aligned to Left Margin with Offset in PDF
place-graph-left-margin-offset.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a Graph object, align it to the left margin with a custom offset, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-graph-width-height.title: Set Graph Width and Height in PDF
set-graph-width-height.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in a PDF, setting its Width and Height properties, adding a rectangle shape, and saving the document.

create-dimension-specific-line-in-pdf-gr.title: Create a Dimension‑Specific Line in a PDF Graph
create-dimension-specific-line-in-pdf-gr.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's drawing library to add a line with explicit coordinates to a Graph object and embed it in a PDF page.

create-dimension-specific-rectangle-in-g.title: Create a Dimension‑Specific Rectangle Inside a PDF Graph
create-dimension-specific-rectangle-in-g.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Rectangle classes to draw a rectangle with explicit dimensions and styling inside a PDF page.

adjust-shape-position-to-fit-page-bounds.title: Adjust Shape Position to Fit Within PDF Page Bounds
adjust-shape-position-to-fit-page-bounds.description: Shows how to verify a rectangle's coordinates against a PDF page size and reposition it so the shape stays inside the page using Aspose.Pdf.

log-shape-bounding-boxes-in-pdf-graph.title: Log Shape Bounding Boxes in PDF Graph
log-shape-bounding-boxes-in-pdf-graph.description: Creates a PDF with a graph containing rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes, then iterates over the shapes to output each shape's bounding box coordinates (or notes when unavailable).

rotate-graph-in-pdf.title: Rotate a Graph Element in a PDF
rotate-graph-in-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a graph containing a rectangle shape, apply a 45‑degree rotation to the entire graph, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

translate-graph-element.title: Translate Graph Element in PDF
translate-graph-element.description: Shows how to reposition a shape inside an Aspose.Pdf Graph by applying horizontal and vertical offsets and updating the PDF document.

non-uniform-scaling-graph.title: Non‑Uniform Scaling of a Graph in PDF
non-uniform-scaling-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a graph, add a shape, and apply different scaling factors on the X and Y axes to change its aspect ratio before saving the PDF.

skew-rectangle-x-axis-pdf-graph.title: Skew a Rectangle in a PDF Graph on the X‑Axis
skew-rectangle-x-axis-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph, draw a rectangle, and apply an X‑axis skew to achieve a slanted visual effect.

apply-clipping-region-to-pdf-graph.title: Apply Clipping Region to PDF Graph
apply-clipping-region-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a clipping rectangle with low‑level PDF operators and render a graph so that its shapes appear only inside the defined area.

transparent-shape-graph-layer.title: Create Transparent Shape Using Graph Layer in PDF
transparent-shape-graph-layer.description: Demonstrates how to start a transparency layer with a Graph, draw a semi‑transparent rectangle, and save the PDF document.

add-shadow-effect-to-filled-rectangle.title: Add Shadow Effect to a Filled Rectangle in a PDF Graph
add-shadow-effect-to-filled-rectangle.description: Shows how to simulate a shadow for a rectangle inside an Aspose.Pdf Graph by drawing an offset semi‑transparent rectangle behind the main shape.

insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
insert-dashed-polyline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and style its border with a dashed line using Aspose.Pdf.

create-layered-graph-pdf.title: Create Layered Graph in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-layered-graph-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to build a Graph, add shapes, create a PDF layer with low‑level drawing operators, control its visibility, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-inside-graph.title: Add Text Inside a Graph with Custom Font and Position
add-text-inside-graph.description: Demonstrates creating a graph in a PDF, applying styling, and inserting a text fragment with a specific font, size, color, and coordinates inside the graph.

add-background-image-and-overlay-graph.title: Add Background Image to PDF and Overlay Graph Shapes
add-background-image-and-overlay-graph.description: Shows how to insert a background image on a PDF page and draw vector shapes (rectangle and line) on top using Aspose.Pdf Graph with Z‑index control.

insert-scale-rotate-image-in-pdf.title: Insert, Scale, and Rotate an External Image in a PDF
insert-scale-rotate-image-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add an external image to a PDF page (or graph), scale it proportionally, and rotate it by a specified angle using Aspose.Pdf.

add-filled-arc-with-radial-gradient.title: Add Filled Arc with Radial Gradient to PDF Graph
add-filled-arc-with-radial-gradient.description: Shows how to create an Arc shape inside a Graph and fill it with a radial gradient shading in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-single-page.title: Create a PDF with a Single Page
create-pdf-with-single-page.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add a default‑size page, and save the file using Aspose.Pdf.

create-graph-matching-page-size.title: Create a Graph Matching Page Size in PDF
create-graph-matching-page-size.description: Shows how to instantiate a Graph that exactly matches a PDF page's width and height and add a rectangle shape to it using Aspose.Pdf.

add-red-filled-rectangle-to-pdf.title: Add a Red Filled Rectangle to a PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
add-red-filled-rectangle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph that covers the page, and draw a solid red rectangle with an optional black border using absolute coordinates.

semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.title: Create Semi-Transparent Ellipse in PDF
semi-transparent-ellipse-pdf.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a semi‑transparent fill in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting an ARGB color and adding the shape to a Graph container.

insert-centered-text-into-graph-rectangl.title: Insert Centered Text into a Graph Rectangle in PDF
insert-centered-text-into-graph-rectangl.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle inside a Graph and place a centered "Hello World" TextFragment at its center using Aspose.Pdf.

enable-boundscheckmode-graph-validation.title: Enable BoundsCheckMode for Graph Shape Validation
enable-boundscheckmode-graph-validation.description: Demonstrates how to create a Graph container, add a rectangle shape, and enable BoundsCheckMode.ThrowExceptionIfDoesNotFit to ensure the shape fits within the graph bounds before rendering the PDF.

add-shapes-with-bounds-checking-to-pdf.title: Add Shapes with Bounds Checking to PDF
add-shapes-with-bounds-checking-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding rectangles, ellipses and lines inside a Graph container, performing custom bounds‑checking, catching a custom exception, logging out‑of‑range coordinates, and saving the document.

add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.title: Add Multiple Rectangles to a PDF Graph with Overlap Checking
add-non-overlapping-rectangles-to-pdf-gr.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a graph area, and places several rectangles of varying sizes while verifying their page bounds to ensure no overlap occurs.

create-graph-rectangle-ellipse.title: Create Graph with Rectangle and Ellipse in PDF
create-graph-rectangle-ellipse.description: Shows how to build a Graph, add rectangle and ellipse shapes with fill and stroke properties, and place the graph on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to File
export-pdf-to-memorystream-and-save.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it to a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream to a file on disk.

add-graph-shapes-to-pdf-page.title: Add Graph with Shapes to a New PDF Page
add-graph-shapes-to-pdf-page.description: The example loads an existing PDF, adds a blank page, creates a Graph object, draws rectangle, ellipse and line shapes, and saves the modified document.

insert-full-page-watermark-rectangle-int.title: Insert Full-Page Watermark Rectangle into Multiple PDFs
insert-full-page-watermark-rectangle-int.description: The example iterates over all PDF files in a folder, adds a light-gray rectangle that covers each page as a watermark, and saves the modified documents to an output folder.

add-ellipse-graph-to-pdf-pages-parallel.title: Add Ellipse Graph to PDF Pages Using Parallel.ForEach
add-ellipse-graph-to-pdf-pages-parallel.description: Demonstrates loading PDF files, iterating through each page, creating a Graph with an ellipse shape, and saving the modified document while processing multiple PDFs concurrently with Parallel.ForEach.

configure-graph-line-style-add-rectangle.title: Configure Graph Line Style and Add Custom Bordered Rectangle
configure-graph-line-style-add-rectangle.description: Shows how to set line width and dash pattern on a Graph, apply the same style to a rectangle shape, and add the shape to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-radial-gradient-ellipse.title: Apply Radial Gradient Fill to an Ellipse with Dark Gray Border
apply-radial-gradient-ellipse.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph canvas, draw an ellipse, set a dark gray border, and fill the shape with a radial gradient using Aspose.Pdf.

set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50-percent.title: Set Rectangle Fill Opacity to 50% in PDF
set-rectangle-fill-opacity-50-percent.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a rectangle shape with a semi‑transparent fill using an ARGB color value, and save the document for visual verification.

create-predefined-graph.title: Create Predefined Graph with Shapes for PDF Pages
create-predefined-graph.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line that can be added to any PDF page.

serialize-pdf-to-byte-array.title: Serialize PDF to Byte Array for Transmission
serialize-pdf-to-byte-array.description: Loads a PDF file containing a graph, saves it into a MemoryStream, and extracts a byte array that can be transmitted over a network.

add-graph-with-labels-to-pdf.title: Add Graph with Labels to PDF
add-graph-with-labels-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array, creating a Graph with rectangle, line, and ellipse shapes, adding text labels using TextBuilder, and saving the modified document.

toggle-graph-boundscheckmode.title: Toggle Graph BoundsCheckMode Based on User Setting
toggle-graph-boundscheckmode.description: Demonstrates how to switch the Aspose.Pdf Graph's BoundsCheckMode between strict exception throwing and default ignore behavior according to a user‑defined setting, and adds the graph to a PDF page.

pdf-report-graph-with-legend.title: Create PDF Report with Graph and Legend
pdf-report-graph-with-legend.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF report containing a simple bar‑graph made of colored rectangles and a corresponding legend using Aspose.Pdf.

create-rounded-rectangle-solid-fill.title: Create Rounded Rectangle with Solid Fill in PDF
create-rounded-rectangle-solid-fill.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle with rounded corners, set a corner radius, and apply a solid fill and border using Aspose.Pdf.

create-rotate-ellipse-pdf.title: Create and Rotate an Ellipse in a PDF
create-rotate-ellipse-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding an ellipse to a PDF, applying a 45° rotation via GraphInfo, setting visual styles, and saving the document with Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.title: Create a PDF Collage by Positioning Multiple Graphs
create-pdf-collage-multiple-graphs.description: Shows how to add several Graph objects—a rectangle, an ellipse, and a line—at different page coordinates to build a collage on a single PDF page.

graph-drawing-with-clipping-limitations.title: Graph Drawing with Shapes and Clipping Discussion
graph-drawing-with-clipping-limitations.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph, adding rectangle and ellipse shapes, and explains that Aspose.Pdf.Graph lacks a Clip property, suggesting the use of Page.AddGraphics with a clipping rectangle.

add-gradient-rectangle-alpha-transparenc.title: Add Gradient Rectangle with Alpha Transparency to PDF
add-gradient-rectangle-alpha-transparenc.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangle filled with a linear axial gradient that transitions from fully transparent to fully opaque, illustrating the use of the alpha channel in Aspose.Pdf.

calculate-ellipse-bounding-box.title: Calculate Bounding Box of an Ellipse in a PDF
calculate-ellipse-bounding-box.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf, compute its bounding box using CalculateContentBBox, and print the coordinates.

multi-page-pdf-full-page-graphs.title: Create Multi-Page PDF with Full-Page Graphs
multi-page-pdf-full-page-graphs.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with multiple pages where each page contains a Graph that fills the entire page dimensions using Aspose.PDF.

add-ellipse-with-bounds-checking-to-pdf.title: Add Ellipse with Bounds Checking to PDF
add-ellipse-with-bounds-checking-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding an ellipse inside a Graph, enabling bounds checking that throws if the shape exceeds page limits, and logging detailed coordinates when an exception occurs, with platform‑specific GDI+ handling.

apply-json-defined-fill-colors-to-pdf-sh.title: Apply JSON-Defined Fill Colors to PDF Shapes
apply-json-defined-fill-colors-to-pdf-sh.description: The example loads a JSON configuration that maps shape types to color names, resolves the colors, and uses Aspose.Pdf to draw rectangles, ellipses and lines with the specified fill or stroke colors in a PDF.

add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
add-dashed-rectangle-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates drawing a rectangle with a 2‑point border and dashed line style inside a Graph container and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

ellipse-radial-gradient-pattern.title: Create Ellipse with Radial Gradient Pattern Fill
ellipse-radial-gradient-pattern.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse in a PDF and fill it with a custom radial gradient pattern brush using Aspose.Pdf, then adds a text label to verify rendering.

pdf-graph-overlapping-rectangles.title: Create PDF with Overlapping Shapes in Graph
pdf-graph-overlapping-rectangles.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add a Graph container, and place two overlapping rectangle shapes inside it using Aspose.Pdf. It also notes the removal of BoundsCheckMode in recent versions.

test-out-of-bounds-rectangle-throws-exce.title: Test Out‑of‑Bounds Rectangle Throws BoundsOutOfRangeException
test-out-of-bounds-rectangle-throws-exce.description: Demonstrates a unit test that adds a rectangle larger than the page size and asserts that Aspose.Pdf.Generator throws a BoundsOutOfRangeException.

batch-insert-graph-with-logo-into-pdfs.title: Batch Insert Graph with Logo into PDFs
batch-insert-graph-with-logo-into-pdfs.description: Loads each PDF in a folder, creates a vector graph containing a background rectangle, a company‑logo rectangle, and a sample line, adds the graph to the first page, and saves the modified file to an output folder.

create-pdf-with-graph.title: Create PDF with In-Memory Graph using Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-with-graph.description: Shows how to generate a PDF entirely in memory, add a simple graph containing a rectangle shape, and return the PDF as a byte array.

add-graph-to-pdf.title: Add Graph to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
add-graph-to-pdf.description: The example loads an existing PDF, creates a Graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line, adds it to the first page, and saves the modified document.

add-radial-gradient-rectangle-to-pdf.title: Add Radial Gradient Rectangle to PDF
add-radial-gradient-rectangle-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a rectangle inside a graph and fill it with a radial gradient that transitions from opaque red at the center to transparent red at the edges, then save the PDF.

create-pdf-with-proportional-graphs.title: Create PDF with Proportional Graphs on Each Page
create-pdf-with-proportional-graphs.description: Generates a PDF where each page contains a graph sized and positioned proportionally to the page dimensions, and adds rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes to the graph.

apply-dictionary-fill-colors-to-pdf-shap.title: Apply Dictionary-Based Fill Colors to PDF Shapes
apply-dictionary-fill-colors-to-pdf-shap.description: Demonstrates using a Dictionary to map shape identifiers to Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Color values and applying those colors when creating rectangles, ellipses, and lines within a PDF graph.

draw-ellipse-with-centered-text.title: Draw Ellipse with Transparent Fill and Centered Text
draw-ellipse-with-centered-text.description: Demonstrates how to create an ellipse with a thick border and semi‑transparent fill using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing, and then place a centered TextFragment inside the shape.

pdf-graph-shapes-with-text.title: Create PDF with Graph Shapes and Text
pdf-graph-shapes-with-text.description: Demonstrates how to add a Graph container to a PDF page, draw rectangle and ellipse shapes, and place TextFragment objects with different fonts and colors inside each shape using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-rectangle-change-fill-color.title: Clone Rectangle and Change Fill Color in PDF
clone-rectangle-change-fill-color.description: Creates a PDF document, draws a rectangle, clones it with a different fill color, adds both rectangles to a graph, and saves the file.

scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.title: Scale Graph Shapes by 150% Using Aspose.Pdf
scale-graph-shapes-150-percent.description: Shows how to apply a 150 % scaling transformation to all shapes in an Aspose.Pdf Graph before adding it to a PDF page.

add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.title: Add Rectangle with Shadow to PDF
add-rectangle-with-shadow-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, draw a semi‑transparent offset rectangle as a shadow, and place a main rectangle on top.

create-pdf-graph-border-colors-lookup.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
create-pdf-graph-border-colors-lookup.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph with multiple shapes whose border colors are set using a dictionary lookup table.

insert-graph-into-pdf-footer.title: Insert Graph into PDF Footer Using Page Margins
insert-graph-into-pdf-footer.description: Shows how to create a simple graph shape and place it in the footer area of a PDF page by configuring footer margins with Aspose.Pdf.

horizontal-bar-chart-rectangles.title: Create Horizontal Bar Chart with Rectangles
horizontal-bar-chart-rectangles.description: Demonstrates how to generate a simple horizontal bar chart in a PDF by looping to add ten rectangle shapes using Aspose.Pdf. Each rectangle is placed with incremental X coordinates and custom styling.

apply-texture-brush-to-ellipse.title: Apply Texture Brush to Ellipse in PDF
apply-texture-brush-to-ellipse.description: Demonstrates loading an image as a texture, adding it to a PDF page, and drawing an ellipse with a transparent fill so the image shows through as a pattern.

create-pdf-graph-filled-rectangle-stroke.title: Create PDF Graph with Filled Rectangle and Stroke-Only Circle
create-pdf-graph-filled-rectangle-stroke.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a graph containing a filled rectangle and a stroke‑only circle, and saves the file.

export-graph-to-pdf.title: Export a Graph to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
export-graph-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a Graph object to a page, and save the result as a PDF file.

create-star-shape-pdf-graph.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF Graph
create-star-shape-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to generate a star polygon with a configurable number of points, fill color, and outline, and render it inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph and Path objects.

add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.title: Add Regular Hexagon to PDF Graph
add-regular-hexagon-to-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to create a regular hexagon shape inside a PDF graph, set its border color and thickness, and save the document.
